name: development-workflow
description: Create approved product requirements, technical specifications, and reviewed plans, generate executable handoff prompts, implement explicitly approved bounded changes, or govern AGENTS rules with per-diff approval.

interface.shortDescription: Create PRDs, plans, prompts, bounded changes, and AGENTS rules.
interface.longDescription: Create approved product requirements and technical specifications, produce reviewed plans and self-contained handoff prompts, implement explicitly approved bounded changes, or govern evidence-backed AGENTS rules with explicit per-diff approval.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the full PRD-to-prompt workflow, implement an explicitly approved bounded change without expanding scope, or govern evidence-backed AGENTS rules with explicit per-diff approval.
